title: bolcotcot's cobblemon
description:
A fabric cobblemon modpack to play with a better experience, every mods are client side and the mods are normaly compatible.

Made by me and myself and bolcotcot (me and myself)
body:
Just a normal cobblemon¹ modpack with mods for better performance or just for more quality of life changes (exemple: xaero's minimap and xaero's world map). There also is a proximity voice chat mod called plasmo voice wish is easy to set up*.

Cobblemon is a mod that adds Pokémons in Minecraft.

The modpack is in minecraft 1.20.


*The only mod that requires to be installed server side is Cobblemon, plasmo voice will not work if it's not downloaded on the server but you will still be able to play server without plasmo voice and people that don't have plasmo voice can still join a server with plasmo voice installed but won't be able to talk or to ear people that have the mod.

¹Cobblemon 1.4
